subcodes.first_line: I testify to that whereunto God did testify before the creation of heaven and earth: There is none other God but Me, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان اشهد بما شهد الله قبل خلق السموات و الارض انه لا اله الا انا المهیمن القیوم
subcodes.subjects: @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @primordial Covenant; the day of alast, @suffering and imprisonment
